summary: Iteration 44 testing complete. Component split verification passed - Header, TrackingTab, ProfileTab, GuideTab all extracted correctly from App.js. All UI elements render correctly, all backend APIs working, no console errors.

VERIFIED: TrackingTab.jsx extracted with Live/Won/Lost/Pushed/Insights tabs + CalibrationPanel + PickCard

VERIFIED: Login flow works with owner email josselj001@gmail.com (auto-verifies)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified the major component split refactor. App.js was reduced from 3328 to 2441 lines. Extracted components: Header.jsx, TrackingTab.jsx, ProfileTab.jsx, GuideTab.jsx. All functionality preserved - this was a pure refactor with no behavioral changes. Current data: 14 hits, 6 misses, 0 pushes. Calibration system has 3 prop types tracked (basketball points with active +15% correction, basketball rebounds, soccer saves).
